rulings.Case Title: JACK LAPIDOS VS. DAVID CHISHOLM ET AL
rulings.Rulings: Real Property/Housing Court Law and Motion Calendar for April 14, 2020 line 1. DEFENDANT DAVID CHISHOLM DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT continued to April 20, 2020. Plaintiff filed a declaration in support of instant action's necessity to protect public health and safety and served it by mail on April 14, 2020. Defendant may file a response to the declaration by 9:00 a.m. April 17, 2020. = (501/CFH)
